name: DLL Search Order Hijacking
description: Detects DLL writes to directories commonly used for search order hijacking
query:
// Detect DLL files written alongside legitimate executables
// Trigger on DLL writes to program directories by non-installer processes
events from endpoint
where event_type = "file_write"
  and file_path matches "(?i)\.(dll|ocx)$"
  and file_path matches "(?i)(Program Files|ProgramData|Windows\\System32)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 2
within 300 seconds
